about.title: About Us
about.description: Meet the story, mission and team behind Bom Piteu.
about.visionText: Centaurus A was born in 2025 with a clear mission: to democratize smart cooking. We believe that technology should serve to bring people together, combat waste and celebrate local and global gastronomic culture.
about.unique1Text: The only platform that learns from your tastes and restrictions to create truly personalized recipes.
about.unique2Text: Created by Angolans, for the world. We focus on the ingredients and traditions of our gastronomy.
about.unique3Text: Our algorithm creates recipes based on the ingredients you already have at home, reducing food waste.
about.team1Bio: Professional chef with 10 years of experience and a passion for technology.
about.team2Bio: Scalable systems architect and expert in data infrastructure.
about.team3Bio: Product engineer focused on high-fidelity interfaces and optimizing the user journey.
about.missionText: Democratize access to healthy and sustainable food worldwide, using cutting-edge technology to create personalized solutions that adapt to each family's life.

communityGuidelines.title: Community Guidelines
communityGuidelines.description: Rules for coexistence and responsible sharing in our gastronomic community.
communityGuidelines.philosophyText: At Bom Piteu, we believe that food brings people together. We created these guidelines to maintain a welcoming, respectful, and inspiring environment for all food lovers.
communityGuidelines.respectInclusionIntro: Culinary diversity is our strength. We expect all community members:
communityGuidelines.respectfulCommunicationDesc: Criticize recipes, not people. Constructive feedback is always welcome.
communityGuidelines.culturalRespectDesc: Value culinary traditions from all cultures without misappropriation.
communityGuidelines.accessibilityDesc: Consider different dietary restrictions and budgets when sharing recipes.
communityGuidelines.foodSafetyWarning: Recipes shared in the community do not replace professional medical advice. Always consult a healthcare professional for allergies, intolerances, or specific medical conditions.
communityGuidelines.allergensDesc: Clearly mention the presence of common ingredients such as gluten, lactose, nuts, etc.
communityGuidelines.safeTemperaturesDesc: Include adequate cooking temperatures for meats and fish to prevent food poisoning.
communityGuidelines.storageDesc: Indicate methods and shelf life for leftovers.
communityGuidelines.moderationSystemIntro: Our moderation team works 24/7 to ensure compliance with these guidelines:
communityGuidelines.reportsDesc: Use the "Report" button on any content to alert moderators. All reports are analyzed within 24 hours.
communityGuidelines.commitmentText: By using the Bom Piteu platform, I commit to respecting these guidelines and contributing to a positive, safe, and inspiring gastronomic community for all.

cookiesPolicy.title: Cookies Policy
cookiesPolicy.description: Understand how we use cookies to make your Bom Piteu experience faster and more personalized.
cookiesPolicy.intro: This Cookies Policy explains how Bom Piteu uses cookies and similar technologies to recognize you when you visit our website or use our app.
cookiesPolicy.whatAreCookiesText: Cookies are small data files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. Cookies are widely used by website owners to make their websites work, or work more efficiently, as well as to provide reporting information.
cookiesPolicy.essentialDesc: Necessary for the basic functioning of the site. Without these cookies, the site does not work correctly.
cookiesPolicy.performanceDesc: Collect information about how visitors use the site, helping us to improve functionality.
cookiesPolicy.analyticsDesc: Allow us to count visits and traffic sources to measure and improve the performance of our site.
cookiesPolicy.marketingDesc: Used to track visitors across websites. The intention is to display ads that are relevant to the individual user.
cookiesPolicy.manageText: You have the right to decide whether to accept or reject cookies. You can set or amend your browser controls to accept or refuse cookies. If you choose to reject cookies, you may still use our website, though your access to some functionality and areas of our website may be restricted.

dataDeletion.title: Data Deletion
dataDeletion.description: How we request, process, and confirm the deletion of your personal data.
dataDeletion.personalDataText: In compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you may request the deletion of your personal data at any time. We process all requests within a maximum of 30 days.
dataDeletion.personalDataExamples: Name, email, phone, date of birth
dataDeletion.financialNote: *Financial data is retained to comply with legal and tax obligations.
dataDeletion.onlineFormDesc: Fill out the deletion form available in our Help Center
dataDeletion.directEmailDesc: Send an email to privacy@bompitieu.com with the subject 'Data Deletion'
dataDeletion.requestReceivedDesc: We receive and validate your request. We send a confirmation email.
dataDeletion.analysisBackupDesc: We create a security backup (30 days) and start deleting primary data.
dataDeletion.completeDeletionDesc: Deletion from all systems, logs, and anonymized data. Final confirmation sent.
dataDeletion.irreversible: Deletion is irreversible. You will not be able to recover your account or data.
dataDeletion.publicRecipes: Publicly shared recipes will be anonymized but kept on the platform.
dataDeletion.subscriptions: Active subscriptions will be canceled without proportional refund.
dataDeletion.exportOption: You may choose to export your data before deletion.
dataDeletion.chooseOption: Choose one of the options below

legalCentral.title: Transparency Center
legalCentral.description: Total transparency in the management of your data and operations of our platform.
legalCentral.heroSubtitle: At Bom Piteu, we believe that trust is built through absolute clarity. Explore how we protect, process and respect your data in every interaction.
legalCentral.dataSecurityDesc: AES-256 encryption, multi-factor authentication and 24/7 monitoring of our systems.
legalCentral.privacyByDesignDesc: We implement privacy principles from the design phase of all our products.
legalCentral.complianceTotalDesc: Full compliance with GDPR, CCPA, LGPD and other international data protection regulations.
legalCentral.regularAuditsDesc: Quarterly independent audits and public security reports available for review.
legalCentral.legalDocsSubtitle: Access all our legal documents, constantly updated and available in multiple formats.
legalCentral.privacyPolicyDesc: Detailed document explaining how we collect, process, store and protect your personal data.
legalCentral.termsOfServiceDesc: Legal agreement establishing the rights and responsibilities between you and Bom Piteu.
legalCentral.ctaTitle: Transparency Is Not an Option, It's a Commitment
legalCentral.ctaSubtitle: We are available to clarify any questions about our policies, security practices or data management.

footer.title: Bom Piteu! · Your Smart Kitchen
footer.description: Committed to transparency and the security of our users.

partnerships.title: Partnerships
partnerships.description: Join us in the mission to transform food in Portugal.
partnerships.workWithUsDesc: We value strategic partnerships with brands that share our vision of healthier, more sustainable, and more accessible food.
partnerships.type1Desc: Direct integration with shopping lists and personalized promotions.
partnerships.type2Desc: Featured recipes with your products and targeted campaigns.
partnerships.type3Desc: Partnerships with nutritionists, gyms, and specialized clinics.
partnerships.advantage1Desc: Monthly reports on food trends, consumption behaviors, and demographic insights.
partnerships.advantage2Desc: Reach the right audience based on food preferences, dietary restrictions, and purchasing habits.
partnerships.advantage3Desc: Dedicated APIs for synchronizing products, stock, and promotional campaigns.

form.multipleSelectHint: Hold Ctrl to select multiple options
form.ndaLabel: I need a non-disclosure agreement (NDA) before sharing details

partnerships.evaluationDesc: All proposals are evaluated within 5-10 business days. We will contact you to schedule an initial meeting.

paymentsPolicy.title: Payment Policy
paymentsPolicy.description: Total transparency on payment methods, security, and refunds.
paymentsPolicy.secureTransactionsDesc: We use bank-level encryption and certified payment systems to ensure the security of all your transactions.

refunds.fullDesc: Up to 14 days after purchase, if the service has not been used.
refunds.partialDesc: Proportional to the remaining time of the subscription after cancellation.
refunds.nonRefundableDesc: Payments for annual subscriptions after 30 days.

paymentsPolicy.financialSupportDesc: For questions about invoices, refunds or payments:

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.description: Learn how Bom Piteu handles your data to provide the best gastronomic experience.
privacyPolicy.intro: <0>Your privacy is fundamental to us. At <1>Bom Piteu</1>, we are committed to protecting your personal data and being transparent about how we collect and use it.</0>
privacyPolicy.section1Text: <0>This Privacy Policy describes our practices regarding the collection, use and disclosure of information when you use our application and website. By accessing or using the Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.</0>
privacyPolicy.rightsText: Access, correct and delete your data at any time in the settings.
privacyPolicy.promiseText: We will never sell your personal data to third parties or advertisers.
privacyPolicy.section2Intro: We collect information when you create your account, save a recipe or interact with our community:
privacyPolicy.dataProfileText: Name, email address and phone number (optional).
privacyPolicy.dataPreferencesText: Dietary restrictions, allergies and ingredient preferences.
privacyPolicy.dataUsageText: Viewed recipes, scanned ingredients and app interactions.
privacyPolicy.dataTechnicalText: IP address, device type, operating system and browsing data.
privacyPolicy.section3Intro: We use the information collected to:
privacyPolicy.use2: Personalize your experience and recipe suggestions;
privacyPolicy.use4: Communicate with you about updates, offers and support;
privacyPolicy.use5: Detect, prevent and resolve technical issues.
privacyPolicy.section4Text: We do not sell your personal data to third parties. We may share information with trusted service providers who help us operate our business (e.g., cloud hosting, data analysis), always under strict confidentiality obligations.
privacyPolicy.section5Text: The security of your data is important to us, but remember that no method of transmission over the Internet or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. We strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your personal data.
privacyPolicy.section6Text: <0>If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us via email: <1>privacidade@bompiteu.com</1>.</0>

support.title: Help & Support
support.description: Find quick answers, tutorials and ways to contact our team.

header.title: Professional, fast and human support
header.description: Get expert help anytime through our official channels.

items.q: How do I reset my password?
items.a: Go to the login page, click 'Forgot password' and follow the instructions sent to your email.

items.q: Can I use the same account on multiple devices?
items.a: Yes, you can access your account on up to 5 devices simultaneously.

items.q: How do I cancel my Premium subscription?
items.a: Go to Settings → Subscription → Cancel Subscription. Cancellation is effective at the end of the paid period.
Yes, you can download up to 50 recipes for offline access in the Premium version.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Describe your problem or question in detail...

urgent.label: Check if this matter is urgent

termsOfUse.title: Terms of Use
termsOfUse.description: By using Bom Piteu, you agree to the rules of coexistence and use of our culinary intelligence.
termsOfUse.section1: <0>Welcome to Bom Piteu. By accessing our platform, you agree to these terms and conditions of use. Please read them carefully.</0>
termsOfUse.section1Text: <0>By downloading, installing or using the Bom Piteu application, or by accessing our website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of the terms, you may not access the Service.</0>
termsOfUse.section2List:
<0>
  • Modify, copy or create derivative works based on the Service;
  • Use the Service for any illegal or unauthorized purposes;
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems or other users' accounts.
termsOfUse.section3Text: <0>To access certain features, you may need to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password and accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account.</0>
termsOfUse.quote: "Reproduction, copying or extraction of data (scraping) of our recipes for commercial purposes without prior authorization is prohibited."
termsOfUse.section4Text: <0>The Service uses Artificial Intelligence to generate recipes and suggestions. While we strive for accuracy, we do not guarantee that all generated recipes are perfect or suitable for all tastes or dietary restrictions. Use your judgment when cooking.</0>
termsOfUse.section5Text: <0>Bom Piteu strives to provide accurate information, but we are not responsible for allergies or culinary results that do not meet expectations, and the use of recipes is entirely at the user's own risk.</0>
termsOfUse.section6Text: <0>We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms at any time. If a revision is material, we will try to provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect.</0>

chatBot.welcomeMessage: Hello, {{name}}! I am your Culinary Assistant, ready for action. What are we cooking today?
chatBot.categoryWelcomeMessage: Hello! I see you are interested in "{{category}}". Tell me what you are looking for within this category and I will create the perfect recipe for you!
chatBot.startStepByStepQuestion: Want to start step by step?
chatBot.favoriteGreeting: Hello, {{name}}! I am your Culinary Assistant. Shall we prepare "{{title}}"?
chatBot.sessionLoaded: 🍳 Session "{{title}}" loaded. The messages from this conversation were not fully saved. You can start a new recipe!
chatBot.sessionRestoredDesc: "{{title}}" loaded exactly as you left it.
chatBot.unsupportedFormatDesc: Please send only images or PDF documents
chatBot.sentPhoto: I sent a photo of the ingredients
chatBot.sentDocument: I sent a document with recipes
chatBot.selectRecipeError: Could not select the recipe. Try again.
chatBot.selectRecipeErrorMessage: Sorry, there was an error selecting the recipe. Could you try again?
chatBot.selectRecipeFirst: First select a recipe to start!
chatBot.keepGoing: Keep it up to level up!
chatBot.preparingNextStep: I am preparing the next step...
chatBot.stepError: Error fetching next step. Try again in a few seconds.
chatBot.stepErrorDesc: Problem generating the step. Check your connection.
chatBot.noDishUnderstood: I didn't understand which dish you want to make
chatBot.askIngredients: What ingredients do you have available?
chatBot.askIngredientsFor: To make a {{dish}}, what ingredients do you have available?
chatBot.tellIngredientsDesc: What ingredients do you have to make the cake?
chatBot.ingredientsError: Sorry, I couldn't create the recipe with these ingredients. Could you try with others?
chatBot.ingredientsErrorDesc: Problem creating recipe with the provided ingredients
chatBot.understoodQuestion: I understood your question about this step!
chatBot.stepQuestionError: Sorry, I couldn't process your question about this step. Try moving to the next step!
chatBot.thinking: I am thinking about the best recipes for you...
chatBot.noRecipesFound: Sorry, I couldn't find recipes with those ingredients. Could you be more specific or try other ingredients?
chatBot.loginAgain: Please log in again to continue
chatBot.sessionExpiredMessage: Looks like your session has expired. Please log in again to continue.
chatBot.technicalError: Sorry, I'm having technical issues. Could you try again?
chatBot.howDoYouRate: How do you rate this experience?
chatBot.ratingSentFor: Rating sent: {{value}}/5 stars for this recipe!
chatBot.autoSaved: This recipe was automatically saved to your history
chatBot.stepByStepError: Could not start step by step
chatBot.inputPlaceholder: I have chicken, tomato and onion...
chatBot.ratingSentDesc: Thank you for your {{value}}/5 star rating for "{{title}}"!
chatBot.favoriteError: Could not update favorites. Try again.
chatBot.recipeCopiedDesc: The recipe was copied to the clipboard.
chatBot.recipeReadyDescSimple: The recipe text is ready. Copy manually if needed.
